name: Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows
what_it_means: Critical workflows (payments, ticketing, check-in/out) can be automated, replayed, or executed out of sequence due to weak backend state/velocity controls.
animated_example: Skipping the queue barriers and running straight to the finish line — repeatedly.
quick_checks: Backend enforces step order/state (cannot skip steps)
Rate/velocity limits and bot defenses on sensitive steps
how_to_test: Rapidly replay a critical step with a script
Attempt to skip validations and jump to final action
expected_outcomes: Rejections with state/sequence errors; throttling on velocity
minimal_example: POST /checkout without successful /validate → 409/422; repeat /pay rapidly → throttled
mitigation: Implement server-side workflow state machines that enforce step ordering — each step must verify all prior steps completed successfully and reject out-of-sequence requests with 409 Conflict
Issue idempotency keys for every critical operation (payments, bookings, redemptions) and reject duplicate submissions within a defined time window using server-side deduplication
Deploy velocity controls and bot-detection signals (request frequency, device fingerprinting, behavioral CAPTCHA) specifically on high-value flows to prevent automated abuse
Validate all business preconditions on the server side before executing sensitive actions — never trust the client to have completed prior validation steps in a multi-step flow
